Skill: Delivery Prioritization
Description: Prioritize backlog and delivery scope based on real impact, applying Essentialism, 80/20, and antifragile principles to reduce work-in-progress and increase throughput with controlled risk. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Objective Focus team energy on the highest-value outcomes each delivery cycle.  ## Rules
Triggers: backlog prioritization, sprint scope, essentialism, 80 20, delivery planning
Stack: Next.js 15+ App Router; React 19+; TanStack Query; shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4; Monorepo (apps + packages)
Workflow:
- 1. List candidate work items and expected outcomes.
- 2. Score impact, effort, risk, and reversibility.
- 3. Keep top leverage items and cut marginal work.
- 4. Sequence by dependency and blast radius.
- 5. Publish final scope, exclusions, and success criteria.
Output Contract:
- Ranked priority list with rationale.
- Explicit out-of-scope list.
- Recommended execution sequence.
- Success metric per delivery item.
